name: Netflix
interviewFormat: 2-3 phone screens, 5-6 onsite rounds (each interviewer focuses on a different dimension: technical depth, judgment, communication, culture fit)
questionPatterns: tell me about a hard decision you made with limited data
describe a time you pushed back on your manager and were right
design a global content delivery system / streaming pipeline
how do you stay current with technology
tell me about a failure and what you would do differently
